get.description: Return all listed items that have been active longer than stale_listing_days.

post.description: Apply configured price drop to all stale listings.

get.description:
Estimate Claude API cost for enriching a set of items.
?skus=SKU1,SKU2  — target specific items
?batch_size=N    — target next N unenriched items (default 10)

patch.description: Manual field override — sets manual_override=True to protect from AI reprocessing.
Set cost for an item. Sets cost_manual=True but does NOT set manual_override.

get.description: Serve a local image file for the review UI.

post.description: Run AI analysis on a single item via the API.
Run Claude enrichment pipeline on a single item.

Re-run category intelligence for a single item.
Triggered by title or category changes in review queue.
Never triggered by item specifics changes.
Returns updated template and validation result.

get.description: Return current category template and validation status for item.

post.description: Trigger the intake worker in the background.
Send multiple items back to review queue.
Upload one or more photos, append their URLs to image_paths.

delete.description: Remove a photo URL from image_paths (does not delete from Cloudinary).

post.description: Move a photo URL to index 0 in image_paths.

Generate a Claude title or description suggestion.
Never auto-applies — returns suggestion for user review only.

get.description: Get price suggestion from eBay sold comps.

post.description: Re-run category detection and update local ebay_category_id/name.

get.description: Redirect browser to eBay OAuth consent page.
Exchange authorization code for tokens and save to data/ebay_tokens.json.

post.description: Manually mark an item as sold with price and fees. Creates a SaleRecord.

patch.description:
Update a live eBay listing after publish.
Uses PUT /sell/inventory/v1/inventory_item/{sku} to update fields.
Allowed updates: title, description, price, item_specifics.
Does NOT update: category_id, condition (these require relisting).
Returns success or eBay error details.

get.description: Return category spreadsheet summary — fill rates, avg prices, trends.
Return all DB-backed settings as {key: value} dict.

patch.description:
Partial update of DB-backed settings.
Validates keys against whitelist — rejects unknown keys with 400.
Returns full updated settings dict on success.

get.description: Return active listings (status = listed or exported).
Sync active listings from eBay inventory API (paginated).
Diagnose eBay connectivity and auth wiring from the API process.

post.description:
Multi-step push of field updates to eBay.
Returns per-step results so the UI can show progress.
Steps: inventory_item, offer, promotion.

delete.description: Withdraw offer from eBay (ends listing, keeps inventory item).
